official_sources.authority_note: Official binary source for the registry key used by the minimal packet-support fixture.
Official binary source for constructing the Configuration clientbound registry_data packet fixture.
Official binary source for Configuration clientbound registry_data body encoding and decoding.
Official binary source for Configuration clientbound registry_data framed packet encoding.
Official binary source for Configuration clientbound registry_data framed packet dispatch/decode.
Official binary source for the Configuration clientbound packet table.
Official binary source for reading decoded registry_data fields.

field_notes.registry_key: The fixture uses the official Registries.DIMENSION_TYPE ResourceKey.
field_notes.entries: The fixture deliberately uses List.of() so the packet-support proof does not invent registry entries, NBT payloads, or initialized registry contents. The generated answer owns the resulting bytes.

stop_boundary: Proves Configuration clientbound registry_data packet framing and dispatch/decode for an official DIMENSION_TYPE registry-key fixture with an official empty entry list only; do not infer real registry contents, RegistrySynchronization.packRegistries output, registry hydration, Configuration completion, Play entry, world load, render readiness, or runtime behavior.
